strategy_snapshot.name: Custom Ratio Spot
strategy_snapshot.author: meridian

token_criteria.notes: Any token. Ratio expresses directional bias.

entry.condition: Directional view on token
entry.notes: 75% token = bullish (sell on pump out of range). 75% SOL = bearish/DCA-in (buy on dip). Set bins_below:bins_above proportional to ratio.

range.notes: bins_below:bins_above ratio matches token:SOL ratio. E.g., 75% token → ~52 bins below, ~17 bins above.

exit.notes: Close when OOR or TP hit. Re-deploy with updated ratio based on new momentum signals.

strategy_snapshot.best_for: Expressing directional bias while earning fees both ways

strategy_snapshot.name: Evil Panda
strategy_snapshot.author: EvilPanda

token_criteria.notes: Tokens that have pumped hard and are near a perceived top. High fee pools only — target the highest available fee tier for the token. bin_step 80-125.

entry.condition: Token near perceived top after large pump.
entry.notes: 15m supertrend flips bullish (price breaks above supertrend) —use calculate_supertrend(timeframe=15m) and look for flipped=true + direction=BULLISH. This confirms the pump is mature. Deploy SOL-only below current price immediately. Do not deploy before the signal.

range.notes: Wide range: -86% to -94% below current price, ~240+ bins.All bins_below, bins_above=0.

exit.notes: Do NOT exit on just one signal alone. Do NOT exit just because the position is OOR — hold through the dump and wait for recovery.

strategy_snapshot.best_for: Capturing fees during large token dumps. Be the final exit liquidity for panicked sellers, bundlers, and stop losses. Earn fees on the way down, exit on the recovery signal.
